corps: CNSS: 3andek ta3wid mali jdid. Verifier lma3loumat dyalek bach twslek ddef3a.
CNSS: tm twa9if l7sab dyalek moa9atan. Cliki hna bach t2akked lhawiya.
CNSS: khassek t7addet lbayanat dyalek 9bel 24 sa3a bach mattwa9efch listifada.
DGI: kayn ta2khir f ddariba dyalek. Chouf tafasil w khalles mn hna.
DGI: l7sab jibai dyalek me7taj ta2kid lhawiya daba.
DGI: tm ta3liq lmilaf ddaribi dyalek 7tta t7addet lma3loumat.
Barid Bank: lcompte dyalek t9fl moa9atan. Verifier lhawiya bach t7ellou.
Barid Bank: tsjlat 3amaliya machbouha f 7sabek. Ila machi nta verifier daba.
Barid Bank: lbita9a dyalek salat. Jedded lma3loumat lbankiya mn hna.
CIH: kayna mo7awala dkhoul machbouha l7sab dyalek. Ammenou daba.
CIH: lcompte dyalek me7taj verification 3ajila bach maytseddch.
Attijariwafa bank: lbita9a dyalek ghadi ttw9ef ila ma dirti-ch update.
Orange Maroc: rb7ti 50Go internet gratuitement. Active lhadia dyalek daba.
Inwi: chari7a dyalek ghadi ttw9ef. Verifier lma3loumat chakhsia mn hna.
IAM: 3andek recharge gratuite 100DH. Cliki hna bach tf3elha.
ONCF: rihla dyalek tbeddlat. Chouf taw9it ljdid mn had rabit.
RAM: lvol dyalek تلغى. Talab remboursement mn hna.
ONEE: facture dyalek mazal ma tkhallsatch. 3andek 24h 9bel l9t3.
Wizarat Siha: dossier tebbi dyalek me7taj update f aw9at 9riba.
Wizarat l3adl: 3andek convocation rasmiya. Jawb 3liha f 48h.
